use_codes.desc: ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS WEIGHING AT LEAST 10 KG AS A SOURCE OF ZINC, COPPER, MANGANESE, AND SELENIUM FOR PARENTERAL NUTRITION WHEN ORAL OR ENTERAL NUTRITION IS NOT POSSIBLE, INSUFFICIENT, OR CONTRAINDICATED
